description: SophiaAgent built-in theory knowledge base covering sociology, education, politics, psychology, and communication

core_propositions: 社会资本促进集体行动
关系网络影响资源获取
信任降低交易成本
theories.methodological_implications: 适合网络分析和问卷调查
classic_works: Bourdieu, P. (1986). The Forms of Capital.
Coleman, J. (1988). Social Capital in the Creation of Human Capital.
Putnam, R. (2000). Bowling Alone.

core_propositions: 社会空间由多个相对自主的场域构成
行动者的惯习由场域塑造
不同资本在场域中竞争
theories.methodological_implications: 适合定性田野调查和参与式观察
classic_works: Bourdieu, P. (1984). Distinction: A Social Critique of the Judgement of Taste.
Bourdieu, P., & Wacquant, L. (1992). An Invitation to Reflexive Sociology.

core_propositions: 人际互动本质上是交换过程
行动者追求收益最大化
依赖产生权力
theories.methodological_implications: 适合实验研究和博弈论模型
classic_works: Homans, G. (1958). Social Behavior as Exchange.
Blau, P. (1964). Exchange and Power in Social Life.
Emerson, R. (1976). Social Exchange Theory.

core_propositions: 人类行为基于对符号意义的解释
自我通过社会互动形成
情境定义指导行动
theories.methodological_implications: 适合民族志、参与式观察和深度访谈
classic_works: Mead, G. H. (1934). Mind, Self, and Society.
Blumer, H. (1969). Symbolic Interactionism.
Goffman, E. (1959). The Presentation of Self in Everyday Life.

core_propositions: 社会是一个相互依赖的系统
每个部分都对整体有功能贡献
社会趋向均衡状态
theories.methodological_implications: 适合宏观比较研究和历史分析
classic_works: Parsons, T. (1951). The Social System.
Merton, R. K. (1968). Social Theory and Social Structure.
Durkheim, E. (1893). The Division of Labor in Society.

core_propositions: 社会由利益冲突的群体构成
权力和资源的分配是不平等的
冲突是社会变迁的动力
theories.methodological_implications: 适合历史比较研究和批判性话语分析
classic_works: Marx, K. (1867). Capital.
Dahrendorf, R. (1959). Class and Class Conflict in Industrial Society.
Coser, L. (1956). The Functions of Social Conflict.

core_propositions: 弱关系提供新信息
结构洞创造竞争优势
网络位置影响资源获取
theories.methodological_implications: 适合社会网络分析和计算社会学方法
classic_works: Granovetter, M. (1973). The Strength of Weak Ties.
Burt, R. (1992). Structural Holes.
Wasserman, S., & Faust, K. (1994). Social Network Analysis.

core_propositions: 知识是学习者主动建构的
学习是社会互动的过程
认知发展经历阶段性变化
theories.methodological_implications: 适合课堂观察、学习分析和设计型研究
classic_works: Piaget, J. (1952). The Origins of Intelligence in Children.
Vygotsky, L. (1978). Mind in Society.
Bruner, J. (1966). Toward a Theory of Instruction.

core_propositions: 自我效能感影响行为选择和努力程度
成功经验是最强的效能来源
效能信念影响情绪调节
theories.methodological_implications: 适合量表测量和实验干预研究
classic_works: Bandura, A. (1977). Self-efficacy: Toward a Unifying Theory of Behavioral Change.
Bandura, A. (1997). Self-Efficacy: The Exercise of Control.

core_propositions: 学习可以通过观察和模仿发生
个人、行为和环境相互影响
认知因素中介环境与行为的关系
theories.methodological_implications: 适合实验研究和纵向追踪设计
classic_works: Bandura, A. (1986). Social Foundations of Thought and Action.
Bandura, A. (1977). Social Learning Theory.

core_propositions: 教育系统再生产社会不平等
文化资本是教育成功的关键
学校偏好支配阶层的文化代码
theories.methodological_implications: 适合教育社会学调查和民族志研究
classic_works: Bourdieu, P., & Passeron, J. C. (1977). Reproduction in Education, Society and Culture.
Bourdieu, P. (1979). The Inheritors.

core_propositions: 教育是一种投资行为
人力资本积累提高收入
教育回报率可量化计算
theories.methodological_implications: 适合经济学回归分析和成本效益分析
classic_works: Becker, G. (1964). Human Capital.
Schultz, T. (1961). Investment in Human Capital.

core_propositions: 学习涉及对意义视角的批判性检视
反思是转化性学习的核心
对话促进视角转变
theories.methodological_implications: 适合叙事研究和纵向质性研究
classic_works: Mezirow, J. (1991). Transformative Dimensions of Adult Learning.
Mezirow, J. (2000). Learning as Transformation.

core_propositions: 国家能力是发展的前提条件
国家能力包括汲取、规制和行政维度
弱国家难以实现有效治理
theories.methodological_implications: 适合比较历史分析和跨国定量研究
classic_works: Fukuyama, F. (2014). Political Order and Political Decay.
Scott, J. (1998). Seeing Like a State.
Centeno, M. (2002). Blood and Debt.

core_propositions: 制度塑造政治行为和经济绩效
制度变迁具有路径依赖性
正式和非正式制度共同作用
theories.methodological_implications: 适合比较案例研究和历史制度分析
classic_works: North, D. (1990). Institutions, Institutional Change and Economic Performance.
March, J., & Olsen, J. (1984). The New Institutionalism.
Hall, P., & Taylor, R. (1996). Political Science and the Three New Institutionalisms.

core_propositions: 经济发展促进民主化
公民社会是民主化的重要力量
民主巩固需要制度和文化条件
theories.methodological_implications: 适合跨国比较研究和过程追踪
classic_works: Huntington, S. (1991). The Third Wave.
Linz, J., & Stepan, A. (1996). Problems of Democratic Transition and Consolidation.
Przeworski, A. (1991). Democracy and the Market.

core_propositions: 政治行为者也是理性自利的
集体行动存在搭便车问题
政府干预可能产生寻租行为
theories.methodological_implications: 适合形式模型、博弈论和计量经济学分析
classic_works: Buchanan, J., & Tullock, G. (1962). The Calculus of Consent.
Olson, M. (1965). The Logic of Collective Action.
Tullock, G. (1967). The Welfare Costs of Tariffs, Monopolies, and Theft.

core_propositions: 经济发展带来社会和政治现代化
现代化是一个线性演进过程
传统社会向现代社会转型
theories.methodological_implications: 适合跨国比较和纵向发展研究
classic_works: Lipset, S. M. (1959). Some Social Requisites of Democracy.
Lerner, D. (1958). The Passing of Traditional Society.
Rostow, W. (1960). The Stages of Economic Growth.

core_propositions: 早期依恋关系影响毕生发展
依恋类型影响人际关系模式
安全依恋促进心理健康
theories.methodological_implications: 适合纵向追踪研究和陌生情境实验
classic_works: Bowlby, J. (1969). Attachment and Loss (Vol. 1).
Ainsworth, M. (1978). Patterns of Attachment.

core_propositions: 不一致的认知产生心理不适
人们倾向于减少认知失调
失调驱动态度和行为改变
theories.methodological_implications: 适合实验研究和态度量表测量
classic_works: Festinger, L. (1957). A Theory of Cognitive Dissonance.
Festinger, L., & Carlsmith, J. (1959). Cognitive Consequences of Forced Compliance.

core_propositions: 个体通过群体成员身份定义自我
内群体偏好和外群体贬抑普遍存在
社会比较影响群体认同强度
theories.methodological_implications: 适合最小群体实验和问卷调查
classic_works: Tajfel, H. (1978). Differentiation between Social Groups.
Tajfel, H., & Turner, J. (1979). An Integrative Theory of Intergroup Conflict.
Turner, J. (1987). Rediscovering the Social Group.

core_propositions: 人有三种基本心理需求
满足基本需求促进内在动机
自主性支持促进幸福感
theories.methodological_implications: 适合实验研究和量表测量
classic_works: Deci, E., & Ryan, R. (1985). Intrinsic Motivation and Self-Determination in Human Behavior.
Ryan, R., & Deci, E. (2000). Self-Determination Theory.

core_propositions: 媒体不能告诉人们怎么想，但能告诉人们想什么
媒体议程影响公众议程
属性议程设置影响态度形成
theories.methodological_implications: 适合内容分析和时间序列分析
classic_works: McCombs, M., & Shaw, D. (1972). The Agenda-Setting Function of Mass Media.
McCombs, M. (2014). Setting the Agenda.

core_propositions: 框架通过选择和凸显来建构意义
不同框架导致不同的理解和判断
媒体框架影响公众认知
theories.methodological_implications: 适合内容分析、实验研究和话语分析
classic_works: Goffman, E. (1974). Frame Analysis.
Entman, R. (1993). Framing: Toward Clarification of a Fractured Paradigm.
Gitlin, T. (1980). The Whole World is Watching.

core_propositions: 受众是主动的媒介使用者
人们使用媒介来满足特定需求
媒介竞争满足同一需求
theories.methodological_implications: 适合问卷调查和深度访谈
classic_works: Katz, E., Blumler, J., & Gurevitch, M. (1974). Uses and Gratifications Research.
Rubin, A. (2002). The Uses-and-Gratifications Perspective on Media Effects.

core_propositions: 数字鸿沟分为接入、使用和素养三个层次
社会经济地位影响数字资源获取
数字不平等加剧社会不平等
theories.methodological_implications: 适合大规模调查和数据挖掘
classic_works: Norris, P. (2001). Digital Divide.
van Dijk, J. (2005). The Deepening Divide.
Hargittai, E. (2002). Second-Level Digital Divide.

core_propositions: 人们通过感知意见气候来调整表达
少数意见者倾向于保持沉默
沉默导致优势意见更加强势
theories.methodological_implications: 适合实验研究和舆论调查
classic_works: Noelle-Neumann, E. (1974). The Spiral of Silence.
Noelle-Neumann, E. (1993). The Spiral of Silence: Public Opinion—Our Social Skin.

core_propositions: 文化资本以身体化、客观化和制度化三种形态存在
文化资本传递社会不平等
教育制度将文化资本转化为资格认证
theories.methodological_implications: 适合文化消费调查和教育社会学研究
classic_works: Bourdieu, P. (1979). La Distinction.
Bourdieu, P. (1986). The Forms of Capital.

core_propositions: 信任是对他人行为的积极预期
系统信任降低社会复杂性
信任是合作的基础
theories.methodological_implications: 适合问卷调查和实验博弈
classic_works: Luhmann, N. (1979). Trust and Power.
Giddens, A. (1990). The Consequences of Modernity.
Fukuyama, F. (1995). Trust: The Social Virtues and the Creation of Prosperity.

core_propositions: 行动者基于成本收益分析做决策
理性行动导致均衡结果
集体行动存在困境
theories.methodological_implications: 适合形式模型和博弈论分析
classic_works: Downs, A. (1957). An Economic Theory of Democracy.
Olson, M. (1965). The Logic of Collective Action.
Becker, G. (1976). The Economic Approach to Human Behavior.

core_propositions: 治理超越政府单一主体
网络结构协调多元行动者
治理强调过程而非层级控制
theories.methodological_implications: 适合案例研究和网络分析
classic_works: Rosenau, J. (1995). Governance in the Twenty-first Century.
Rhodes, R. A. W. (1996). The New Governance.
Osborne, S. (2010). The New Public Governance.

core_propositions: 在特定条件下群际接触减少偏见
平等地位和共同目标是关键条件
制度支持促进积极接触效果
theories.methodological_implications: 适合实验研究和现场干预研究
classic_works: Allport, G. (1954). The Nature of Prejudice.
Pettigrew, T., & Tropp, L. (2006). A Meta-Analytic Test of Intergroup Contact Theory.

core_propositions: 随着信息流入增加，高SES群体比低SES群体获得更多知识
知识差距趋于扩大而非缩小
媒介素养影响知识获取
theories.methodological_implications: 适合面板数据分析和纵向调查
classic_works: Tichenor, P., Donohue, G., & Olien, C. (1970). Mass Media Flow and Differential Growth in Knowledge.

core_propositions: 心流产生于挑战与技能的平衡
心流带来最优体验
心流促进学习和创造力
theories.methodological_implications: 适合体验抽样法和实验研究
classic_works: Csikszentmihalyi, M. (1990). Flow: The Psychology of Optimal Experience.
Csikszentmihalyi, M. (1996). Creativity.

core_propositions: 教育应促进解放而非压迫
对话式教学培养批判意识
知识不是中立的
theories.methodological_implications: 适合行动研究和参与式民族志
classic_works: Freire, P. (1970). Pedagogy of the Oppressed.
Giroux, H. (1988). Teachers as Intellectuals.
McLaren, P. (1995). Critical Pedagogy and Predatory Culture.
